AT0080.title: On-Chain Privacy Analysis Tools
AT0080.description: Analytics tools for tracing on-chain addresses, transaction paths, and cross-chain asset flows. Legitimate organizations use them for compliance, anti-money laundering, and incident response, while attackers may use similar capabilities to deanonymize addresses, identify high-value targets, link wallet identities, or track virtual-asset movement in support of targeted phishing, extortion, and asset theft.

references.title: MITRE ATT&CK: Gather Victim Identity Information
